stemHtml: You are flying at FL280 on radial 285°M inbound a VOR/DME. When being 27 NM from the VOR/DME, you are asked to descend to FL095 until 10 NM outbound the VOR/DME on radial 110°, crossing the VOR/DME overhead. If your average groundspeed is 247 kt, what is the minimum required rate of descent?
